summary: Split UI server responsibilities into explicit Liepin route, static frontend, and Workbench path modules.
rationale: This slice keeps create_app as the BFF composition boundary while moving provider-specific Liepin API behavior, packaged frontend routing, and database path policy into focused modules. The public HTTP behavior, host/origin guard, SSE stream semantics, and prod/dev storage roots remain covered by focused tests.
verification: uv run pytest tests/test_ui_server_decomposition.py tests/test_liepin_api_scope.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py tests/test_workbench_static_frontend.py tests/test_workbench_network_guard.py -q

uv run ruff check src/seektalent_ui/server.py src/seektalent_ui/liepin_routes.py src/seektalent_ui/static_frontend.py src/seektalent_ui/workbench_paths.py tests/test_ui_server_decomposition.py tests/test_liepin_api_scope.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py tests/test_workbench_static_frontend.py tests/test_workbench_network_guard.py

uv run ty check src/seektalent_ui/server.py src/seektalent_ui/liepin_routes.py src/seektalent_ui/static_frontend.py src/seektalent_ui/workbench_paths.py tests/test_ui_server_decomposition.py tests/test_liepin_api_scope.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py tests/test_workbench_static_frontend.py tests/test_workbench_network_guard.py
uv run ty check src tests tools
uv run pytest tests/test_liepin_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_cli.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py -q
deletion_targets: provider-specific Liepin route handlers and SSE helpers embedded in server.py
packaged frontend StaticFiles routing embedded in server.py
Workbench and Liepin database path policy embedded in server.py
tooling imports of server.py private Workbench path helpers
tests depending on server.py private helpers for Liepin streaming or storage path behavior
risks: Liepin API routes must remain protected by the existing host/origin guard after moving to APIRouter.
Static frontend mounting must remain after API routers and continue returning 404 for api paths.
Prod packaged frontend startup intentionally mutates Liepin internal env secrets; tests must isolate that process-wide env behavior.
